vocabulary.sentence: The most powerful ---- to parachuting is fear, but one should also take its high cost into account.
The government decided to ---- strict measures to control the spread of the disease.
It is ---- that we take immediate action to address the climate crisis before it is too late.
The ---- of the experiment confirmed what scientists had predicted about the reaction.

phrasal_verbs.sentence: Making videos should be a lot of fun, but lots of people ---- problems and lose momentum before they even get started.
The government decided to ---- the outdated regulation and replace it with a modern one.
The government has ---- a new set of rules for online data privacy protection.

restatement.sentence: Despite being one of the smallest countries in the world, Luxembourg has one of the highest GDP per capita figures globally.
options: Luxembourg, despite its high GDP per capita, is still considered one of the smallest economies in the world.
Although Luxembourg is among the smallest nations by size, its citizens enjoy one of the highest average incomes worldwide.
Luxembourg's small size has prevented it from achieving high economic output compared to larger nations.
The GDP per capita of Luxembourg is high mainly because of the country's large population density.
Luxembourg's global economic standing is remarkable despite the fact that its GDP has been declining recently.

restatement.sentence: Unlike traditional classrooms, online learning platforms allow students to study at their own pace and revisit course materials as many times as needed.
options: Online learning platforms are considered inferior to traditional classrooms because they do not offer structured schedules.
Traditional classrooms allow students more flexibility than online platforms when it comes to revisiting materials.
In contrast to conventional education settings, digital learning tools give learners the freedom to progress at a comfortable speed and review content repeatedly.
Online learning is only effective for students who already have strong self-discipline and prior academic knowledge.
Students who use online platforms are required to complete their courses faster than those in traditional classrooms.

restatement.sentence: Microplastics have been detected in nearly every environment on Earth, from the depths of the ocean to mountain peaks, raising serious concerns about their long-term effects on ecosystems.
options: Scientists have found microplastics only in ocean environments, where they pose the greatest threat to marine ecosystems.
The discovery of microplastics in virtually all of Earth's environments, including deep seas and high altitudes, has prompted significant worry about their ecological impact over time.
Microplastics are large enough to be filtered out of most ecosystems and therefore pose little long-term environmental risk.
Mountain peaks and ocean depths remain free of microplastics, which are mostly confined to urban and industrial areas.
Concerns about microplastics have been exaggerated by scientists since they break down quickly and cause minimal harm to ecosystems.

grammar.sentence: By the time the rescue team arrived, the trapped miners ---- in the cave for nearly three days.
It is essential that every participant ---- a signed consent form before the trial begins.
The company's latest product has been designed ---- the needs of both professional and amateur photographers.

sentence_completion.sentence: Although the initial results of the experiment were promising, the researchers cautioned that ----.
options: further trials were needed before drawing definitive conclusions
the experiment had already been replicated successfully in other laboratories
all participants had responded positively to the new treatment method
the findings confirmed what scientists had long suspected about the compound
no additional funding would be required to continue the research programme

sentence_completion.sentence: Contrary to popular belief, multitasking does not improve productivity; in fact, ----.
options: it is a skill that can be developed through regular practice and discipline
most people are naturally gifted at handling several complex tasks simultaneously
it tends to reduce the quality of work by dividing cognitive focus between tasks
it is most effective when the tasks being performed require creative thinking
organisations actively encourage employees to develop multitasking capabilities

sentence_completion.sentence: The reason many wildlife species are now listed as endangered is primarily that ----.
options: zoos have failed to implement effective breeding programmes for threatened animals
natural predators have been removed from ecosystems, upsetting the ecological balance
human activities such as habitat destruction, pollution, and poaching have severely reduced their populations
climate scientists have not yet accurately predicted the full impact of global warming on wildlife
conservation funding from international organisations has been declining steadily

cloze_test.passage: The human immune system is a remarkable defence network that protects the body from harmful invaders. When a pathogen such as a bacterium or virus enters the body, specialised white blood cells (1)---- it and trigger an immune response. Some of these cells produce proteins called antibodies, which (2)---- to specific pathogens and neutralise them. This process can take several days the first time the body encounters a new threat, which is why people often feel ill (3)---- the immune system mounts a full response. However, the immune system has a powerful memory: once it has encountered a pathogen, it can respond (4)---- if exposed again, often preventing illness entirely.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: I've been thinking about switching careers. I'm in finance now, but I want to work in education.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: That's a significant change. What's drawing you towards education?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: That's a meaningful reason. Have you looked into any teacher training programmes yet?

options: I think the salary in education is much higher than in finance.
I want to make a direct impact on people's lives rather than just managing numbers.
I have always found that finance offers more job security than education.
I heard that the working hours in schools are much longer than in offices.
I want to work in a field where I don't need to interact with people directly.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: I read that scientists have discovered microplastics in human blood. It's terrifying.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: I saw that too. The long-term effects still aren't fully known.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Do you think people are doing enough to reduce plastic use?

options: Definitely — plastic use has been declining significantly in most countries.
Honestly, not really. Individual efforts help, but we need much stronger policies.
I think the problem is being overstated by environmental groups.
Plastic is completely safe, so there's no need to worry about reducing it.
Only people in wealthy countries need to think about reducing plastic consumption.
